resources.string: welcome to the deserted Rolava, an area that is extremely valuable for its natural and cultural-historical heritage. Please, follow the general rules during your visit:
Do not leave the marked trails
Do not climb the ruins of buildings
Do not pick flowers or destroy flora
Do not throw away any rubbish
Do not remove any artifacts, especially do not use a metal detector
We wish you a pleasant experience!
The price of data roaming in the EU\nis the same as in the Czech\nRepublic.
You need to have roaming turned on\nfor the optimal work of the app.
